items.title: Spain's king welcomes Mexico's World Cup invite after 'abuse' comments
items.dek: News of the invitation emerges after the monarch acknowledged "a lot of abuse" during the Spanish conquest of Mexico.

items.title: Chad warns Sudan it will retaliate after drone strike on mourners kills 17
items.dek: President Idris Mahamat Déby orders the military to be on high alert and a "total closure" of the border.
